items.name: Market research: keyboard layout editor landscape
items.description: Research existing keyboard layout tools, visual editors, and CAD software. Identify market gaps and opportunities.

items.name: User persona definition: keyboard enthusiasts
items.description: Define primary user personas: keyboard enthusiasts, custom keyboard builders, mechanical keyboard hobbyists. Document pain points and needs.

items.name: Competitive analysis: existing tools comparison
items.description: Compare features of KLE (Keyboard Layout Editor), Keyboard Firmware Builder, and similar tools. Identify feature gaps.

items.name: Value proposition refinement
items.description: Refine core value proposition based on market research. Articulate unique differentiators.

items.name: Technical constraint analysis
items.description: Identify technical constraints: browser limitations, SVG capabilities, performance benchmarks, UX patterns.
